meaning: n.[希神]迈达斯(Phrygia国王,爱财,能点物成金),大富翁,善赚大钱者
examples: King Midas loved gold very much.
King Midas got up very early the next morning.
Many years ago, there was a Greek king named Midas.
Almost half of the Midas List investors hold only an MBA (44 in total).
Winmill is the portfolio manager for the Midas Fund (MIDSX) and Midas Perpetual Portfolio (MPERX).
